reviews.comment:
Muy céntrica, pero la playa ha quedado muy reducida, y los autos hacen cola sobre la calle comprometiendo el tránsito.

(Translated by Google)
Very centrally located, but the beach has become much smaller, and cars queue up on the street, disrupting traffic.

reviews.comment:
Reciben todas las tarjetas, todos los servicios. De los pocos lugares donde aún se puede inflar los neumáticos del auto sin pagar "estación de servicios"

(Translated by Google)
They accept all cards and offer all services. One of the few places where you can still inflate your car tires without paying a "gas station".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBa2Jxbzh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
por su ubicación es hoy la estación de servicio para vehículos  mas centrica y tradicional!! en ella se encuentra la sede central del automóvil club argentina ACA excelente atención!!!

(Translated by Google)
Due to its location, it is today the most central and traditional service station for vehicles! It houses the headquarters of the Automobile Club of Argentina (ACA). Excellent service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcWNTS2dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Autoservicio. El personal es atento. No tiene baño propio para clientes del bar, sino en común con el de la estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Self-service. The staff is attentive. It doesn't have its own restroom for bar customers, but rather a shared restroom with the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaFp1RTN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación se ofrece un servicio muy bueno además de que al estar bien ubicado está constantemente con autos y es muy completa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station, it offers very good service, plus its good location means it's always busy and very complete.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeGJqc2d3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio acepta tarjetas de débito y crédito además de proveer los servicios de aire, limpieza de vidrios y revisión de fluidos. Nunca he tenido problemas con el combustible expendido.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station accepts debit and credit cards and also provides air conditioning, windshield cleaning, and fluid checks. I've never had any problems with the fuel they sell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdTRPS2FREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
